Sports

135 solved questions in this topic · SSC GD General Knowledge & General Awareness

Home
Q.No 28 SportsEnglish
In which city and year were the first World Athletics Championships held?
A
Helsinki, 1983
✓ Correct
B
Tokyo, 1991
C
Rome, 1987
D
Berlin, 1993

Solution

Correct answer: A. The first World Athletics Championships were held in Helsinki, Finland, in 1983.

B is incorrect: Tokyo hosted the 1991 edition (and again in 2007).

C is incorrect: Rome hosted the 1987 World Championships.

D is incorrect: The 1993 Championships were held in Stuttgart, not Berlin (Berlin hosted in 2009).

💡 Helsinki's Olympic Stadium, which hosted the 1952 Olympics, was the venue for the inaugural 1983 Championships.
Q.No 33 SportsEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
What is the length of a standard field hockey pitch?
A
80 m
B
91.4 m
✓ Correct
C
100 m
D
105m

Solution

Correct answer: B. A standard field-hockey pitch is 91.4 metres long (100 yards) and 55 metres wide.

A is incorrect: 80 m is shorter than the regulation length.

C is incorrect: 100 m is the length of a standard football pitch's playing area, not a hockey pitch.

D is incorrect: 105 m is the typical length of a full-size football (soccer) field.

💡 The dimensions come from the old imperial measure of 100 yards by 60 yards.
Q.No 28 SportsEnglish
किदाम्बी श्रीकांत किस वर्ष विश्व चैंपियनशिप के फाइनल में पहुंचने वाले पहले भारतीय पुरुष शटलर बने?
A
2017
B
2018
C
2021
✓ Correct
D
2022

Solution

Correct answer: C. Kidambi Srikanth became the first Indian male shuttler to reach the final of the BWF World Championships in 2021 at Huelva, Spain, winning the silver medal.

A is incorrect: 2017 was a strong Super Series year for Srikanth but not when he reached the Worlds final.

B is incorrect: 2018 was not the year of this milestone.

D is incorrect: 2022 is after the achievement, which took place in 2021.

💡 At the same 2021 Worlds, Lakshya Sen won bronze, making it a landmark event for Indian men's badminton.
Q.No 29 SportsEnglish
विश्व तीरंदाजी को अंतर्राष्ट्रीय ओलंपिक समिति (00) द्वारा तीरंदाजी के लिए अंतर्राष्ट्रीय शासी निकाय के रूप में आधिकारिक तौर पर किस वर्ष मान्यता मिली?
A
1932
B
1972
✓ Correct
C
1980
D
1992

Solution

Correct answer: B. Archery returned to the Olympic programme in 1972, the year associated with the international governing body's formal recognition for the sport at the Olympics.

A is incorrect: 1932 is too early; archery was absent from the Olympics for decades after 1920.

C is incorrect: 1980 is after the 1972 reinstatement.

D is incorrect: 1992 is far later than the recognition year.

💡 World Archery (formerly FITA) was founded in 1931 and governs the sport internationally.
Q.No 32 SportsEnglish
क्रिकेट विश्व कप की मेजबानी भारत ने पहली बार किस वर्ष की थी?
A
1975
B
1983
C
1987
✓ Correct
D
1996

Solution

Correct answer: C. India first hosted (co-hosted) the Cricket World Cup in 1987 (the Reliance Cup), shared with Pakistan - the first World Cup held outside England.

A is incorrect: 1975 was the first-ever World Cup, held in England.

B is incorrect: 1983 was the year India won the World Cup, but it was played in England.

D is incorrect: 1996 was the next subcontinent World Cup (India, Pakistan, Sri Lanka), not the first time India hosted.

💡 India later co-hosted the 2011 World Cup and won it, and hosted the 2023 World Cup solo.
Q.No 33 SportsEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
प्रथम आधिकारिक विश्व शतरंज चैंपियन किसे माना जाता है?
A
Bobby Fischer
B
Wilhelm Steinitz
✓ Correct
C
Garry Kasparov
D
Paul Morphy

Solution

Correct answer: B. Wilhelm Steinitz is regarded as the first official World Chess Champion, holding the title from 1886 to 1894.

A is incorrect: Bobby Fischer became World Champion in 1972, nearly a century later.

C is incorrect: Garry Kasparov was World Champion from 1985, in the modern era.

D is incorrect: Paul Morphy was a dominant unofficial player of the 1850s but was never the official world champion.

💡 Steinitz is also credited with developing the principles of positional (strategic) chess.
Q.No 28 SportsEnglish
Who won the ICC Men’s ODI Cricketer of the Year award in 2023?
A
Pat Cummins
B
Suryakumar Yadav
C
Usman Khawaja
D
Virat Kohli
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Virat Kohli won the ICC Men's ODI Cricketer of the Year award for 2023, a year in which he was the leading run-scorer at the 2023 World Cup.

A is incorrect: Pat Cummins won the ICC Men's Cricketer of the Year (Sir Garfield Sobers Trophy) but not the ODI award for 2023.

B is incorrect: Suryakumar Yadav won the ICC Men's T20I Cricketer of the Year for 2023.

C is incorrect: Usman Khawaja was honoured as the Test Cricketer of the Year for 2023.

💡 Kohli scored a record 765 runs in the 2023 ODI World Cup, including his 50th ODI century.
Q.No 30 SportsEnglish
When did India's men's national football team last qualify for the Olympic Games?
A
1956
B
1960
✓ Correct
C
1964
D
1972

Solution

Correct answer: B. India's men's national football team last qualified for the Olympic Games in 1960 (Rome Olympics).

A is incorrect: 1956 (Melbourne) was India's best Olympic football performance (4th place), but they qualified again afterwards.

C is incorrect: India did not qualify for the 1964 Olympics football event.

D is incorrect: 1972 is later than India's last Olympic football appearance.

💡 At the 1956 Melbourne Olympics, India finished fourth - the best-ever finish by an Asian football team at that time.
Q.No 32 SportsEnglish
मैरी कॉम ने किस वर्ष और किस ओलंपिक स्थल पर मुक्‍्केबाजी में कांस्य पदक जीता था?
A
2008, Beijing
B
2012, London
✓ Correct
C
2016, Rio de Janeiro
D
2020, Tokyo

Solution

Correct answer: B. Boxer Mary Kom won a bronze medal at the 2012 London Olympics, becoming the first Indian woman boxer to win an Olympic medal.

A is incorrect: Women's boxing was not part of the 2008 Beijing Olympics.

C is incorrect: Mary Kom did not win a medal at Rio 2016.

D is incorrect: She did not medal at Tokyo 2020.

💡 Mary Kom is a six-time World Amateur Boxing champion, an achievement unmatched by any other boxer.
Q.No 33 SportsEnglish
टोक्यो 2020 ओलंपिक में भारत ने कितने पदक जीते?
A
5
B
6
C
7
✓ Correct
D
8

Solution

Correct answer: C. India won 7 medals at the Tokyo 2020 Olympics (1 gold, 2 silver, 4 bronze) - its best-ever Olympic medal haul.

A is incorrect: 5 understates India's Tokyo tally.

B is incorrect: 6 is one short of the actual count.

D is incorrect: 8 is one more than India actually won.

💡 Neeraj Chopra's javelin gold at Tokyo 2020 was India's first-ever Olympic gold in athletics.
Q.No 28 SportsHindi
किस भारतीय युवा एथलीट ने 5000 मीटर रेस वॉक को 20 मिनट से कम समय (9:24.48) में पूरा करके राष्ट्रीय रिकॉर्ड तोड़ा?
A
तुषार पंवार
B
योगिता
C
नितिन गुप्ता
✓ Correct
D
प्रशांत कुमार

Solution

Correct answer: C. Per the answer key, the athlete in option C broke the national record by completing the 5000 m race walk in under 20 minutes (19:24.48), a notable youth milestone.

A is incorrect: Tushar Panwar is not credited with this particular sub-20-minute record.

B is incorrect: Yogita is not the record-setter for this event.

D is incorrect: Prashant Kumar is not associated with this 5000 m race-walk record.

💡 Race walking is a track-and-field event judged on technique - one foot must appear to stay in contact with the ground at all times.
Q.No 32 SportsEnglish
भारतीय महिला क्रिकेट टीम ने अपना पहला टेस्ट मैच किस वर्ष खेला था?
A
1973
B
1976
✓ Correct
C
1983
D
1986

Solution

Correct answer: B. The Indian women's cricket team played its first Test match in 1976 (against the West Indies at Bangalore).

A is incorrect: 1973 is before India's women's team made its Test debut.

C is incorrect: 1983 is the year India's men won the World Cup, unrelated to the women's Test debut.

D is incorrect: 1986 is after the team had already started playing Tests.

💡 The Women's Cricket Association of India was formed in 1973, leading to the 1976 debut series.
Q.No 32 SportsBengali
1950 সালে ফিবা বাস্কেটবল বিশ্বকাপ প্রতিষ্ঠিত হওয়ার পর নিম্নলিখিত কোন দেশ প্রথম সেটি জিতেছিল?
A
মার্কিন যুক্তরাষ্ট্র
B
আর্তোন্টিনা
✓ Correct
C
ব্রাজিল
D
উরুগুয়ে

Solution

Correct answer: B. Argentina won the first FIBA Basketball World Cup, held in 1950 (in Argentina).

A is incorrect: The United States did not win the inaugural 1950 World Cup.

C is incorrect: Brazil won later editions but not the first one.

D is incorrect: Uruguay did not win the inaugural World Cup.

💡 The tournament was renamed the FIBA Basketball World Cup (from World Championship) in 2014.
Q.No 33 SportsBengali
FIDE বলতে কী বোঝায়?
A
আন্তর্জাতিক ডিজিটাল ইভেন্ট ফেডারেশন (Federation of international Digital Events)
B
ফেডারেশন ইন্টারন্যাশনাল ডেস ইচেকস (Federation internationale des Echecs)
✓ Correct
C
AVA BSenfos (Go ABMAaASA (First International Dual Enterprise)
D
QPUITETA BP BSAA COMA BSH (Federation of indian Domestic Events)

Solution

Correct answer: B. FIDE stands for Fédération Internationale des Échecs (International Chess Federation), the world governing body of chess.

A is incorrect: 'Federation of International Digital Events' is a made-up expansion.

C is incorrect: 'First International Dual Enterprise' is not what FIDE means.

D is incorrect: 'Federation of Indian Domestic Events' is incorrect.

💡 FIDE was founded in Paris in 1924 and organises the World Chess Championship.
Q.No 31 SportsEnglish
The Indian men's hockey team won its last Olympic gold medal in which year?
A
1972
B
1976
C
1980
✓ Correct
D
1984

Solution

Correct answer: C. The Indian men's hockey team won its last Olympic gold medal in 1980 at the Moscow Olympics.

A is incorrect: 1972 (Munich) - India won bronze, not gold.

B is incorrect: 1976 (Montreal) - India did not win gold.

D is incorrect: 1984 - India did not win an Olympic hockey medal.

💡 India has won 8 Olympic gold medals in field hockey, the most by any nation; the 1980 gold is the most recent.
Q.No 31 SportsEnglish
What is the maximum duration of a standard boxing bout in the Olympics?
A
Three 3-minute rounds
✓ Correct
B
Four 2-minute rounds
C
Two 3-minute rounds
D
Three 2-minute rounds

Solution

Correct answer: A. A standard Olympic boxing bout consists of three rounds of three minutes each.

B is incorrect: Four 2-minute rounds is not the Olympic format.

C is incorrect: Two 3-minute rounds is incorrect.

D is incorrect: Three 2-minute rounds is used in some women's formats historically, but the standard is three 3-minute rounds.

💡 Olympic boxing scoring is now done by judges on a 10-point must system.
Q.No 32 SportsEnglish
How many Asian Games medals did India win in shooting at Hangzhou 2023?
A
18
B
22
✓ Correct
C
19
D
21

Solution

Correct answer: B. India won 22 medals in shooting at the Asian Games in Hangzhou (2023), its best-ever shooting haul at the Games.

A is incorrect: 18 understates India's shooting medal count at Hangzhou.

C is incorrect: 19 is short of the actual total.

D is incorrect: 21 is one fewer than the correct number.

💡 India won 28 gold medals and over 100 total medals overall at the 2023 Asian Games.
Q.No 39 SportsEnglish
Who was the first Indian woman to win an Olympic silver medal?
A
Aanchal Thakur
B
P. V. Sindhu
✓ Correct
C
Sania Mirza
D
Dipa Karmakar

Solution

Correct answer: B. P.V. Sindhu was the first Indian woman to win an Olympic silver medal, in badminton at the 2016 Rio Olympics.

A is incorrect: Aanchal Thakur is a skier who won India's first international skiing medal, not an Olympic silver.

C is incorrect: Sania Mirza is a tennis great but did not win an Olympic silver.

D is incorrect: Dipa Karmakar narrowly missed a medal (4th) in gymnastics at Rio 2016.

💡 Sindhu later won bronze at the Tokyo 2020 Olympics, becoming a two-time Olympic medallist.
Q.No 31 SportsEnglish
भारतीय जूडो महासंघ की आधिकारिक स्थापना कब हुई और इसे अंतर्राष्ट्रीय जूडो महासंघ से कब संबद्ध किया गया?
A
1905
B
1929
C
1965
✓ Correct
D
1986

Solution

Correct answer: C. Per the answer key, the Judo Federation of India was officially established and affiliated to the International Judo Federation in 1965.

A is incorrect: 1905 is far too early for organised judo administration in India.

B is incorrect: 1929 is not the founding year given.

D is incorrect: 1986 is later than the establishment year.

💡 Judo, a Japanese martial art, became an Olympic sport for men in 1964 (Tokyo).
Q.No 31 SportsHindi
किस क्रिकेट विश्व कप को "बेन्सन एंड हेजेस विश्व कप (8650 & ६०५६५ ४४०१५ 000)" के नाम से जाना जाता था?
A
1987 Cricket World Cup
B
1992 Cricket World Cup
✓ Correct
C
1996 Cricket World Cup
D
1999 Cricket World Cup

Solution

Correct answer: B. The 1992 Cricket World Cup (held in Australia and New Zealand) was sponsored by and known as the Benson & Hedges World Cup.

A is incorrect: The 1987 World Cup was the Reliance Cup (India/Pakistan).

C is incorrect: The 1996 World Cup was the Wills World Cup (subcontinent).

D is incorrect: The 1999 World Cup was held in England.

💡 The 1992 World Cup was the first to use coloured clothing, white balls and day-night matches; Pakistan won it.
Q.No 32 SportsHindi
2022 के राष्ट्रमंडल खेलों में भारत का पहला स्वर्ण किसने जीता?
A
मीराबाई चानू
✓ Correct
B
बजरंग पुनिया
C
जेरेमी लालरिनुंगा
D
पी.वी. सिंधु

Solution

Correct answer: A. Weightlifter Mirabai Chanu won India's first gold medal at the 2022 Commonwealth Games (Birmingham).

B is incorrect: Bajrang Punia won a wrestling gold but not India's first at the 2022 CWG.

C is incorrect: Jeremy Lalrinnunga won a weightlifting gold, but after Mirabai Chanu.

D is incorrect: P.V. Sindhu won a badminton gold later in the Games.

💡 Mirabai Chanu had earlier won a silver medal at the Tokyo 2020 Olympics.
Q.No 28 SportsHindi
डूरंड कप (00800 000) 2023 फुटबॉल टूर्नामेंट के फाइनल की मेजबानी किस भारतीय शहर ने की?
A
गुवाहाटी
B
मुंबई
C
हैदराबाद
D
कोलकाता
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Kolkata hosted the final of the Durand Cup 2023 football tournament (at the Vivekananda Yuba Bharati Krirangan, Salt Lake Stadium).

A is incorrect: Guwahati hosted some group matches but not the final.

B is incorrect: Mumbai did not host the final.

C is incorrect: Hyderabad was not the final venue.

💡 The Durand Cup is Asia's oldest football tournament, first held in 1888.
Q.No 29 SportsHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
टोक्‍्यो 2020 ओलंपिक में एथलेटिक्स में भारत का एकमात्र पदक किसने जीता?
A
नीरज चोपड़ा
✓ Correct
B
avy set Gist
C
अविनाश साबले
D
हिमा दास

Solution

Correct answer: A. Neeraj Chopra won India's only athletics medal at the Tokyo 2020 Olympics - a gold in the javelin throw.

B is incorrect: This option does not name the medallist.

C is incorrect: Avinash Sable competed in the steeplechase but did not win an athletics medal at Tokyo.

D is incorrect: Hima Das did not win a medal at the Tokyo Olympics.

💡 Neeraj Chopra's gold was India's first-ever Olympic medal in athletics.
Q.No 30 SportsEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
खेलों में डोपिंग के विरुद्ध वैश्विक लड़ाई की देखरेख कौन-सा अंतर्राष्ट्रीय संगठन करता है?
A
WADA
✓ Correct
B
10Cc
C
USADA
D
NADA

Solution

Correct answer: A. The World Anti-Doping Agency (WADA) oversees the global fight against doping in sport.

B is incorrect: The IOC organises the Olympics; it works with WADA but does not run global anti-doping.

C is incorrect: USADA is the United States' national anti-doping agency.

D is incorrect: NADA is India's National Anti-Doping Agency.

💡 WADA was established in 1999 and maintains the World Anti-Doping Code and the prohibited-substances list.
Q.No 28 SportsHindi
2008 में पहला इंडियन प्रीमियर लीग (१) फाइनल किस स्टेडियम में आयोजित किया गया था?
A
एम. चिन्नास्वामी स्टेडियम, बेंगलुरु
B
ईडन गार्डन्स, कोलकाता
C
वानखेड़े स्टेडियम, मुंबई
D
डीवाई पाटिल स्टेडियम, नवी मुंबई
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The first Indian Premier League final in 2008 was held at the DY Patil Stadium, Navi Mumbai, where Rajasthan Royals beat Chennai Super Kings.

A is incorrect: The M. Chinnaswamy Stadium, Bengaluru did not host the 2008 final.

B is incorrect: Eden Gardens, Kolkata was not the 2008 final venue.

C is incorrect: Wankhede Stadium, Mumbai did not host the first IPL final.

💡 Rajasthan Royals, captained by Shane Warne, won the inaugural 2008 IPL title.
Q.No 31 SportsHindi
980 के ओलंपिक में स्वर्ण पदक जीतने वाली भारतीय हॉकी टीम के कप्तान कौन थे?
A
अजीत पाल सिंह
B
ज़फ़र इक़बाल
C
मोहम्मद शाहिद
D
वासुदेवन भास्करन
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Vasudevan Bhaskaran captained the Indian hockey team that won the gold medal at the 1980 Moscow Olympics.

A is incorrect: Ajit Pal Singh captained the 1975 World Cup-winning team, not the 1980 Olympic side.

B is incorrect: Zafar Iqbal was a player but not the 1980 captain.

C is incorrect: Mohammed Shahid was a star player of that era but not the 1980 captain.

💡 The 1980 Moscow gold remains India's most recent Olympic gold in field hockey.
Q.No 28 SportsEnglish
Neeraj Chopra won his first-ever gold medal in javelin at the Asian Games in which year and city?
A
2014, Incheon
B
2018, Jakarta
✓ Correct
C
2022, Hangzhou
D
2010, Guangzhou

Solution

Correct answer: B. Neeraj Chopra won his first Asian Games javelin gold in 2018 at Jakarta.

A is incorrect: 2014 Incheon - Neeraj had not yet emerged at the senior level.

C is incorrect: 2022 Hangzhou - he won gold again, but not his first.

D is incorrect: 2010 Guangzhou - too early in his career.

💡 Neeraj Chopra has won Olympic gold (2020), World Championship gold (2023) and multiple Asian/Commonwealth titles.
Q.No 29 SportsEnglish
What are anabolic steroids primarily used for by athletes who misuse them?
A
Increase endurance
B
Enhance flexibility
C
Build muscle mass
✓ Correct
D
Reduce fatigue

Solution

Correct answer: C. Athletes who misuse anabolic steroids do so primarily to build muscle mass and strength.

A is incorrect: Increasing endurance is more associated with blood-boosting agents like EPO.

B is incorrect: Steroids do not specifically enhance flexibility.

D is incorrect: Reducing fatigue is associated with stimulants, not anabolic steroids.

💡 Anabolic steroids are banned in sport and are on the WADA prohibited list.
Q.No 28 SportsHindi
फीफा विश्व कप की मेजबानी करने वाला पहला एशियाई देश कौन-सा था?
A
दक्षिण कोरिया, जापान
✓ Correct
B
जापान, चीन
C
चीन, वियतनाम
D
मलेशिया, म्यांमार

Solution

Correct answer: A. South Korea and Japan were the first Asian countries to host the FIFA World Cup, co-hosting it in 2002.

B is incorrect: Japan and China did not co-host a World Cup.

C is incorrect: China and Vietnam have not hosted the World Cup.

D is incorrect: Malaysia and Myanmar have not hosted it.

💡 The 2002 World Cup was the first to be co-hosted by two countries; Brazil won the title.
Q.No 31 SportsHindi
2025 में, किन पूर्व भारतीय क्रिकेटरों ने टेस्ट क्रिकेट से संन्यास लेने की घोषणा की है?
A
सचिन तेंदुलकर और सौरव गांगुली
B
रोहित शर्मा और विराट कोहली
✓ Correct
C
रोहित शर्मा और शुभमन गिल
D
राहुल द्रविड़ और एमएस धोनी

Solution

Correct answer: B. In 2025, Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli announced their retirement from Test cricket.

A is incorrect: Sachin Tendulkar and Sourav Ganguly retired years earlier.

C is incorrect: Shubman Gill remains an active Test player.

D is incorrect: Rahul Dravid and M.S. Dhoni had already retired from Tests earlier.

💡 Both continued to be available for limited-overs (ODI) cricket after their Test retirements.
Q.No 40 SportsHindi
टेनिस में, जब कोई खिलाड़ी गेंद को नेट के ठीक ऊपर तथा विपरीत दिशा में गिराने के लिए अपने शॉट की गति कम कर देता है, तो इसे कहा जाता हैं।
A
ड्रॉप शॉट
✓ Correct
B
स्मैश
C
स्लाइस
D
टू-हैण्ड

Solution

Correct answer: A. In tennis, when a player softens the shot to make the ball drop just over the net into the opponent's court, it is called a drop shot.

B is incorrect: A smash is a powerful overhead shot, not a soft one.

C is incorrect: A slice is a shot with backspin, not specifically a soft drop over the net.

D is incorrect: 'Two-hand' refers to a grip (e.g. two-handed backhand), not this shot.

💡 A well-disguised drop shot exploits an opponent positioned far behind the baseline.
Q.No 27 SportsHindi
एक मानक +#॥#/# फुटबॉल मैच की आधिकारिक समय अवधि (अतिरिक्त/चोट समय को छोड़कर) कितनी है?
A
80 मिनट
B
90 मिनट
✓ Correct
C
100 fAae
D
120 fAae

Solution

Correct answer: B. A standard football (soccer) match is played for 90 minutes of official time, split into two halves of 45 minutes each (excluding added/injury time).

A is incorrect: 80 minutes is the duration of a rugby match, not football.

C is incorrect: 100 minutes is not the standard football duration.

D is incorrect: 120 minutes applies only when extra time is added in knockout matches.

💡 The 90 minutes is divided into two 45-minute halves with a 15-minute interval.
Q.No 29 SportsHindi
भारतीय राष्ट्रीय खेलों के किस संस्करण में 20 से अधिक एथलीट डोपिंग परीक्षण में असफल रहे, जो देश में सबसे बड़ी संख्या में से एक है?
A
गुजरात 2022
B
cheet 2015
C
गोवा 2023
✓ Correct
D
उत्तराखंड 2025

Solution

Correct answer: C. At the Goa 2023 edition of the National Games, more than 20 athletes failed doping tests - one of the largest such numbers in the country.

A is incorrect: Gujarat 2022 is not the edition with this record number of failures.

B is incorrect: The Kerala edition is not the one referred to here.

D is incorrect: Uttarakhand 2025 is not the edition cited.

💡 India's National Anti-Doping Agency (NADA) conducts dope testing at the National Games.
Q.No 27 SportsHindi
एक मानक 00। (एक दिवसीय अंतर्राष्ट्रीय) क्रिकेट मैच की अवधि, ब्रेक सहित, पारी के संदर्भ में कितनी होती है?
A
दो पारी, प्रत्येक 50 ओवर की
✓ Correct
B
एक पारी, 50 ओवर की
C
दो पारी, प्रत्येक 20 ओवर की
D
एक पारी, 20 ओवर की

Solution

Correct answer: A. A standard One Day International (ODI) cricket match consists of two innings, each of 50 overs, with a break in between.

B is incorrect: It is not a single 50-over innings; both teams bat.

C is incorrect: Two innings of 20 overs each describes a T20 match.

D is incorrect: A single 20-over innings is not the ODI format.

💡 ODIs were introduced in 1971; the format was originally 60 overs a side before settling at 50.
Q.No 31 SportsHindi
2025 में कौन-सा व्यक्ति भारत का 87वां शतरंज ग्रैंडमास्टर बना?
A
गुकेश
B
हरिकृष्णन ए रा
✓ Correct
C
पराग जैन
D
डी. गुकेश

Solution

Correct answer: B. Per the answer key, Harikrishnan A Ra became India's 87th chess Grandmaster in 2025.

A is incorrect: Gukesh became a GM much earlier and is the World Champion, not the 87th GM.

C is incorrect: Parag Jain is not identified as the 87th GM here.

D is incorrect: D. Gukesh is the same player as 'Gukesh', not the 87th GM.

💡 India has produced a rapidly growing number of chess Grandmasters, led by Viswanathan Anand's legacy.
Q.No 40 SportsHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
टेनिस मैच में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा शॉट खेला जाता है? [. फोरहैंड [. बैकहैंड
A
Only I
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
✓ Correct
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: C. Both the forehand (I) and the backhand (II) are standard groundstrokes played in a tennis match, so 'Both I and II' is correct.

A is incorrect: 'Only I' leaves out the backhand.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' leaves out the forehand.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since both are common tennis shots.

💡 Other tennis strokes include the serve, volley, smash and drop shot.
Q.No 27 SportsEnglish
इंडियन बैडमिंटन लीग (।?8। का पूर्ववर्ती) का पहला संस्करण किस वर्ष आयोजित किया गया था?
A
2013
✓ Correct
B
2014
C
2015
D
2016

Solution

Correct answer: A. The first edition of the Indian Badminton League (the forerunner of the Premier Badminton League) was held in 2013.

B is incorrect: 2014 is not the first edition's year.

C is incorrect: 2015 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 2016 is when it was relaunched as the Premier Badminton League, not the first IBL.

💡 It was rebranded as the Premier Badminton League (PBL) from 2016.
Q.No 40 SportsHindi
पेरिस ओलंपिक 2024 में पुरुष हॉकी में किस टीम ने कांस्य पदक जीता है?
A
नीदरलैंड
B
जर्मनी
C
फ्रांस
D
भारत
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. India won the bronze medal in men's hockey at the Paris 2024 Olympics, beating Spain in the bronze-medal match.

A is incorrect: The Netherlands won the silver medal.

B is incorrect: Germany won the gold medal.

C is incorrect: France did not win the hockey bronze.

💡 It was India's second consecutive Olympic hockey bronze, after Tokyo 2020.
Q.No 36 SportsEnglish
टोक्यों किस वर्ष में ग्रीष्मकालीन ओलंपिक खेलों का मेजबान शहर था?
A
2000
B
2004
C
2008
D
2020
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Tokyo was the host city of the Summer Olympic Games in 2020 (held in 2021 due to the pandemic).

A is incorrect: The 2000 Olympics were in Sydney.

B is incorrect: The 2004 Olympics were in Athens.

C is incorrect: The 2008 Olympics were in Beijing.

💡 Tokyo also hosted the Summer Olympics in 1964.
Q.No 37 SportsHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा खेलों में ट्रैक स्पर्धा में एक रिले स्पर्धा नहीं है? [. 4400 मीटर [[. 4९600 मीटर
A
Only I (4x400 m)
B
Only II (4x600 m)
✓ Correct
C
Both I and II
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: B. The 4x600 m (II) is NOT a standard relay event, whereas the 4x400 m (I) is a recognised relay - so 'Only II' is the event that is not a relay.

A is incorrect: The 4x400 m IS a standard relay, so 'Only I' is wrong.

C is incorrect: 'Both' is wrong because the 4x400 m is a genuine relay.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong because the 4x600 m is not a standard relay event.

💡 Common track relays are the 4x100 m and 4x400 m.
Q.No 25 SportsEnglish
Which state hosted the 37th National Games of India in 2023?
A
Maharashtra
B
Gujarat
C
Kerala
D
Goa
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Goa hosted the 37th National Games of India in 2023.

A is incorrect: Maharashtra did not host the 37th National Games.

B is incorrect: Gujarat hosted the 36th National Games (2022).

C is incorrect: Kerala hosted the 35th National Games (2015).

💡 The National Games are India's premier multi-sport domestic event.
Q.No 40 SportsEnglish
Till Paris Olympics 2024, in which year India has the highest medal tally in any single Olympics?
A
2020
✓ Correct
B
1932
C
2008
D
2012

Solution

Correct answer: A. Until the Paris 2024 Olympics, India's highest medal tally in a single Olympics was at Tokyo 2020, with 7 medals.

B is incorrect: 1932 was an early Games where India won only its hockey gold.

C is incorrect: 2008 Beijing yielded 3 medals.

D is incorrect: 2012 London yielded 6 medals.

💡 Tokyo 2020 gave India 1 gold, 2 silver and 4 bronze - its best Olympic performance.
Q.No 36 SportsEnglish
भारत, में बैडमिंटन विश्व महासंघ से जुड़ गया था।
A
1932
B
1934
C
1936
✓ Correct
D
1938

Solution

Correct answer: C. India joined the Badminton World Federation (then the International Badminton Federation) in 1936.

A is incorrect: 1932 is incorrect.

B is incorrect: 1934 is when the IBF was founded by nine member nations, but India was not a founding member.

D is incorrect: 1938 is not the year India joined.

💡 The IBF (now BWF) was founded in 1934; India became a member two years later, in 1936.
Q.No 37 SportsEnglish
34 जुलाई 2025 तक, पुरुषों का 200 मीटर स्प्रिंट विध रिकॉर्ड सेकंड है।
A
18.19
B
19.19
✓ Correct
C
20.19
D
21.19

Solution

Correct answer: B. As of mid-2025, the men's 200 m sprint world record stands at 19.19 seconds, set by Usain Bolt at the 2009 World Championships.

A is incorrect: 18.19 seconds is faster than any recorded 200 m time.

C is incorrect: 20.19 seconds is slower than the world record.

D is incorrect: 21.19 seconds is far slower than the record.

💡 Usain Bolt also holds the 100 m world record of 9.58 seconds.
Q.No 37 SportsEnglish
माइकल फेल्प्स ने किस ओलंपिक में रिकॉर्ड 8 स्वर्ण ओलंपिक पदक जीते थे?
A
2016
B
2008
✓ Correct
C
2012
D
2004

Solution

Correct answer: B. Michael Phelps won a record 8 gold medals at the 2008 Beijing Olympics.

A is incorrect: At Rio 2016 he won multiple golds but not a single-Games record of 8.

C is incorrect: At London 2012 he did not win 8 golds.

D is incorrect: At Athens 2004 he won 6 golds.

💡 Phelps is the most decorated Olympian of all time with 23 gold medals overall.
Q.No 40 SportsHindi
निम्नलिखित में से किसने कभी ओलंपिक पदक नहीं जीता है?
A
पी.वी. सिंधु
B
सानिया मिर्ज़ा
✓ Correct
C
साइना नेहवाल
D
मैरी कॉम

Solution

Correct answer: B. Sania Mirza has never won an Olympic medal, whereas the others have.

A is incorrect: P.V. Sindhu has won Olympic silver (2016) and bronze (2020).

C is incorrect: Saina Nehwal won an Olympic bronze (2012).

D is incorrect: Mary Kom won an Olympic bronze in boxing (2012).

💡 Sania Mirza is a multiple Grand Slam doubles champion but reached only the semi-finals at the Olympics.
Q.No 36 SportsHindi
खालीलपैकी कोणत्या शहरात 202 समर ऑलिंपिक क्रीडा स्पर्धा आयोजित करण्यात आले होते?
A
London
✓ Correct
B
Paris
C
Sydney
D
Beijing

Solution

Correct answer: A. The 2012 Summer Olympic Games were held in London.

B is incorrect: Paris hosted the 2024 Olympics.

C is incorrect: Sydney hosted the 2000 Olympics.

D is incorrect: Beijing hosted the 2008 Olympics.

💡 London has hosted the Summer Olympics three times - 1908, 1948 and 2012.
Q.No 37 SportsHindi
खालीलपैकी कोणते ट्रेंक अँड फील्ड इव्हेंट्स स्टेडियमच्या बाहेर आयोजित केले जात नाहीत?
A
मेरेथॉन
B
3000 मी. स्टीपलचेस
✓ Correct
C
5५0 कि.मी. वॉकिंग
D
20 कि.मी. वॉकिंग

Solution

Correct answer: B. The 3000 m steeplechase is held inside the stadium (on the track), unlike the marathon and the long-distance race-walks, which are conducted outside the stadium on roads.

A is incorrect: The marathon is run on roads outside the stadium.

C is incorrect: The 50 km walk is held outside the stadium.

D is incorrect: The 20 km walk is held outside the stadium.

💡 The steeplechase includes fixed barriers and a water jump on the track.
Q.No 35 SportsEnglish
पहली इंडियन ओपन गोल्फ चैंपियनशिप कब आयोजित हुई थी?
A
1964
✓ Correct
B
1978
C
1955
D
1999

Solution

Correct answer: A. The first Indian Open Golf Championship was held in 1964.

B is incorrect: 1978 is later than the first edition.

C is incorrect: 1955 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 1999 is much later.

💡 The Indian Open is one of Asia's prominent professional golf tournaments.
Q.No 38 SportsEnglish
भारत में, रीसेट (पूर्व खिलाड़ी सशक्तिकरण प्रशिक्षण) कार्यक्रम में शुरू किया गया था।
A
2021
B
2020
C
2024
✓ Correct
D
2023

Solution

Correct answer: C. The RESET (Retired Sportsperson Empowerment Training) programme was launched in India in 2024 to help former athletes build second careers.

A is incorrect: 2021 is not the launch year.

B is incorrect: 2020 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 2023 is not when it was launched.

💡 The scheme trains retired sportspersons in coaching, management and allied roles.
Q.No 36 SportsEnglish
जुलाई 2025 तक, महिला वर्ग में मीटर का राष्ट्रीय रिकॉर्ड दुती चंद का है।
A
100
✓ Correct
B
200
C
400
D
800

Solution

Correct answer: A. As of July 2025, Dutee Chand held the national record in the women's 100 metres sprint.

B is incorrect: She is not the 200 m national record holder asked here.

C is incorrect: She does not hold the 400 m record.

D is incorrect: She does not hold the 800 m record.

💡 Dutee Chand is a noted Indian sprinter who has represented India at the Olympics.
Q.No 37 SportsEnglish
जूडो की अंतर्राष्ट्रीय प्रतियोगिता के दौरान, प्रत्येक मैच ____ मिनट तक चलता है।
A
2
B
4
✓ Correct
C
8
D
10

Solution

Correct answer: B. In international judo competitions, each match lasts 4 minutes (for seniors).

A is incorrect: 2 minutes is too short for a senior judo bout.

C is incorrect: 8 minutes is too long.

D is incorrect: 10 minutes is not the standard duration.

💡 A judo match can end early by 'ippon', the decisive winning score.
Q.No 36 SportsEnglish
रॉयल चैलेंजर्स बेंगलुरु ने में डब्ल्यू.पी.एल. महिला प्रीमियर लीग (क्रिकेट) का खिताब जीता था।
A
2023
B
2024
✓ Correct
C
2022
D
2021

Solution

Correct answer: B. Royal Challengers Bengaluru won the Women's Premier League (WPL) title in 2024.

A is incorrect: In 2023 (the inaugural WPL) Mumbai Indians won.

C is incorrect: There was no WPL in 2022.

D is incorrect: There was no WPL in 2021.

💡 The WPL is the women's franchise T20 league launched by the BCCI in 2023.
Q.No 37 SportsHindi
2वें एशियाई खेल में आयोजित किए जाएंगे।
A
Doha
✓ Correct
B
Beijing
C
Tokyo
D
Dhaka

Solution

Correct answer: A. The 2030 Asian Games will be held in Doha, Qatar.

B is incorrect: Beijing is not the 2030 host.

C is incorrect: Tokyo is not the host.

D is incorrect: Dhaka is not the host.

💡 The 2026 Asian Games are scheduled for Aichi-Nagoya, Japan, and 2034 for Riyadh.
Q.No 38 SportsHindi
पेमिल हॉर्स तथा पैरेलल बार्स निम्नलिखित में से किस खेल से संबंधित शब्द हैं?
A
जिमनास्टिक्स
✓ Correct
B
क्रिकेट
C
बैडमिंटन
D
खो-खो

Solution

Correct answer: A. 'Pommel horse' and 'parallel bars' are apparatus/terms associated with gymnastics.

B is incorrect: They are not cricket terms.

C is incorrect: They are not badminton terms.

D is incorrect: They are not kho-kho terms.

💡 Men's artistic gymnastics includes six apparatus, including the pommel horse and parallel bars.
Q.No 36 SportsEnglish
Dev Meena holds the national record in pole vault with 5.40 metres set in :
A
2019
B
2023
C
2014
D
2025
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Dev Meena set the national pole-vault record of 5.40 metres in 2025.

A is incorrect: 2019 is not when this record was set.

B is incorrect: 2023 is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 2014 is incorrect.

💡 Pole vaulting is a track-and-field event requiring speed, strength and technique.
Q.No 37 SportsEnglish
In athletics, all running events come under : I. Track events II. Ground events
A
Only I
✓ Correct
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: A. In athletics, all running events come under track events (I), so 'Only I' is correct; there is no separate category called 'ground events'.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' is wrong; running events are track events.

C is incorrect: 'Both' is wrong since running events are only track events.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since running events are track events.

💡 Athletics is broadly divided into track events (running) and field events (jumps and throws).
Q.No 36 SportsEnglish
ସଚିନ ତେନ୍ଦୁଲକର କେବେ ତାଙ୍କର 100ତମ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ଶତକ ହାସଲ କରିଥିଲେ?
A
2009
B
2012
✓ Correct
C
2014
D
2011

Solution

Correct answer: B. Sachin Tendulkar scored his 100th international century in 2012 (against Bangladesh in the Asia Cup).

A is incorrect: 2009 is before the milestone.

C is incorrect: 2014 is after he retired from international cricket (2013).

D is incorrect: 2011 is the year he reached 99 centuries, not 100.

💡 Sachin Tendulkar is the only cricketer to score 100 international centuries.
Q.No 37 SportsOdia
ନିମ୍ନଲିଖିତ କେଉଁ ବର୍ଷ ସୁଶୀଲ କୁମାର ଅଲିମ୍ପିକ୍‌ ପଦକ ଜିତିଥିଲେ? 1. 2008 1[. 2012
A
Only I
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
✓ Correct
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: C. Sushil Kumar won Olympic medals in both 2008 (bronze, Beijing) and 2012 (silver, London), so 'Both I and II' is correct.

A is incorrect: 'Only I' omits his 2012 medal.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' omits his 2008 medal.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since he won in both years.

💡 Sushil Kumar was the first Indian to win individual Olympic medals at two consecutive Games.
Q.No 38 SportsOdia
ରୋମାନ ରିଂଗ୍ଧ, ଭଲ୍ଟିଂ ଟେବଲ କେଉଁ କ୍ରୀଡ଼ା ଇଭେଣ୍ଟ ସହିତ ଜଡ଼ିତ ଶବ୍ଦ?
A
ଜିମ୍ନାଷ୍ଟିକ୍ସ
✓ Correct
B
ହକି
C
ଲଂ ଜମ୍ପ
D
ପୋଲ ଭଲ୍ଟ

Solution

Correct answer: A. 'Roman rings' and the 'vaulting table' are apparatus associated with gymnastics.

B is incorrect: They are not hockey terms.

C is incorrect: They are not long-jump terms.

D is incorrect: They are not pole-vault apparatus.

💡 The rings test upper-body strength and balance in men's artistic gymnastics.
Q.No 26 SportsEnglish
कबड्डी में महिलाओं के लिए मानक कोर्ट का आकार क्या है?
A
10 m x 8 m
B
12 m x 8 m
✓ Correct
C
11 m x 8 m
D
13 m x 11 m

Solution

Correct answer: B. The standard kabaddi court for women measures 12 m x 8 m.

A is incorrect: 10 m x 8 m is not the women's court size.

C is incorrect: 11 m x 8 m is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 13 m x 11 m is the men's court size.

💡 The men's kabaddi court is larger, at 13 m x 10 m.
Q.No 36 SportsHindi
सचिन तेंदुलकर ने अपना 00वां अंतर्राष्ट्रीय शतक कहाँ बनाया था?
A
Dhaka
✓ Correct
B
Mumbai
C
Chennai
D
Perth

Solution

Correct answer: A. Sachin Tendulkar scored his 100th international century at Dhaka (Mirpur), against Bangladesh, in 2012.

B is incorrect: It was not scored in Mumbai.

C is incorrect: It was not in Chennai.

D is incorrect: It was not in Perth.

💡 It was Sachin's only century against Bangladesh and his historic 100th ton.
Q.No 36 SportsEnglish
आई.पी.एल. (इंडियन प्रीमियर लीग) का पहला सीज़न किस वर्ष में खेला गया था?
A
2008
✓ Correct
B
2009
C
2010
D
2011

Solution

Correct answer: A. The first season of the Indian Premier League (IPL) was played in 2008.

B is incorrect: 2009 was the second season (held in South Africa).

C is incorrect: 2010 was the third season.

D is incorrect: 2011 was the fourth season.

💡 Rajasthan Royals won the inaugural 2008 IPL title.
Q.No 37 SportsEnglish
भारतीय वॉलीबॉल महासंघ का गठन किस वर्ष में हुआ था?
A
1951
✓ Correct
B
1980
C
1958
D
1976

Solution

Correct answer: A. The Volleyball Federation of India was formed in 1951.

B is incorrect: 1980 is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 1958 is not the founding year.

D is incorrect: 1976 is incorrect.

💡 Volleyball is a popular sport in many Indian states, played at school and national levels.
Q.No 38 SportsHindi
नीचे दिए गए कौशल को "टो टच" कहा जाता है जो निम्नलिखित में से किस खेल से संबंधित है? ्
A
बास्केटबाल
B
कबड्डी
✓ Correct
C
फुटबॉल
D
बैडमिंटन

Solution

Correct answer: B. The skill called 'toe touch' is associated with the sport of kabaddi, where a raider quickly touches a defender's toe and retreats.

A is incorrect: It is not a basketball term.

C is incorrect: It is not a football term.

D is incorrect: It is not a badminton term.

💡 The toe-touch is a common raiding technique to score a point in kabaddi.
Q.No 35 SportsHindi
खेलों में दवाओं के दुरुपयोग के संबंध में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा एक एनाबोलिक एजेंट है? ।. ऑक्सेंड्रोलोन |. ऑक्साबोलोन
A
Only I
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
✓ Correct
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: C. Both Oxandrolone (I) and Oxabolone (II) are anabolic agents banned in sport, so 'Both I and II' is correct.

A is incorrect: 'Only I' omits Oxabolone.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' omits Oxandrolone.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since both are anabolic agents.

💡 Anabolic agents are listed on the WADA Prohibited List.
Q.No 36 SportsHindi
निम्नलिखित में से किस पूर्वोत्तर राज्य ने राष्ट्रीय खेल 2025 में सबसे अधिक पदक जीते हैं?
A
मणिपुर
✓ Correct
B
अरुणाचल प्रदेश
C
असम
D
मिजोरम

Solution

Correct answer: A. Among north-eastern states, Manipur won the most medals at the National Games 2025.

B is incorrect: Arunachal Pradesh did not top among NE states.

C is incorrect: Assam did not win the most among NE states.

D is incorrect: Mizoram did not top the NE tally.

💡 Manipur is a sporting powerhouse, producing many national and international athletes.
Q.No 40 SportsHindi
सचिन तेंदुलकर ने अंतर्राष्ट्रीय क्रिकेट में अपना पहला टेस्ट मैच किस टीम के खिलाफ खेला था?
A
श्रीलंका
B
ऑस्ट्रेलिया
C
पाकिस्तान
✓ Correct
D
इंगलैंड

Solution

Correct answer: C. Sachin Tendulkar played his first Test match against Pakistan, in 1989 at Karachi.

A is incorrect: His debut was not against Sri Lanka.

B is incorrect: It was not against Australia.

D is incorrect: It was not against England.

💡 Sachin made his Test debut at just 16, facing the pace of Wasim Akram and Waqar Younis.
Q.No 35 SportsEnglish
प्रो कबड्डी लीग कब शुरू की गई थी?
A
2014
✓ Correct
B
2017
C
2012
D
2011

Solution

Correct answer: A. The Pro Kabaddi League was launched in 2014.

B is incorrect: 2017 is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 2012 is not the launch year.

D is incorrect: 2011 is incorrect.

💡 The Pro Kabaddi League greatly boosted the popularity and professionalism of kabaddi in India.
Q.No 36 SportsEnglish
ढाका में दक्षिण एशियाई महासंघ खेलों का मेजबान था।
A
2004
B
2006
C
2010
✓ Correct
D
2016

Solution

Correct answer: C. Dhaka hosted the South Asian (Federation) Games in 2010.

A is incorrect: 2004 SAF Games were in Islamabad.

B is incorrect: 2006 Games were in Colombo.

D is incorrect: 2016 Games were in Guwahati/Shillong, India.

💡 The South Asian Games are a regional multi-sport event among SAARC nations.
Q.No 37 SportsHindi
यह तस्वीर क्रिकेट के खेल में अंपायर द्वारा दिए गए संकेतों में से एक को दर्शाती है। इसे क्या कहा जाता है? श छल 3 न 5.2
A
लेग बाई
B
शर्ट रन
C
चौका
D
डेड बॉल
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The cricket umpire signal shown - crossing and uncrossing the wrists below the waist - indicates a 'Dead Ball'.

A is incorrect: A 'leg bye' is signalled by tapping a raised knee.

B is incorrect: A 'short run' is signalled by tapping the near shoulder.

C is incorrect: A 'four' is signalled by waving the arm across the chest.

💡 A dead ball means no runs can be scored and the delivery does not count for certain purposes.
Q.No 26 SportsEnglish
खो-खो में एक डिफेंस पारी के आरंभ में कितने डिफेंडर प्रवेश करते हैं?
A
2
B
3
✓ Correct
C
4
D
5

Solution

Correct answer: B. In kho-kho, 3 defenders enter the field at the start of a defending turn (innings).

A is incorrect: 2 is fewer than the number that enter.

C is incorrect: 4 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 5 is incorrect.

💡 Defenders enter in batches of three and try to avoid being tagged by the chasers.
Q.No 36 SportsHindi
2025 में विश्व पैरा एथलेटिक्स चैंपियनशिप की मेजबानी किस भारतीय शहर नें की थी?
A
नई दिल्ली
✓ Correct
B
चेन्नई
C
मुंबई
D
हैदराबाद

Solution

Correct answer: A. New Delhi hosted the World Para Athletics Championships in 2025.

B is incorrect: Chennai did not host it.

C is incorrect: Mumbai did not host it.

D is incorrect: Hyderabad did not host it.

💡 It was the first time India hosted the World Para Athletics Championships.
Q.No 34 SportsHindi
2025 में रग्बी प्रीमियर लीग का फाइनल कहाँ आयोजित किया गया था?
A
जयपुर
B
इंदौर
C
चेन्नई
D
मुंबई
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The final of the Rugby Premier League 2025 was held in Mumbai.

A is incorrect: It was not held in Jaipur.

B is incorrect: It was not in Indore.

C is incorrect: It was not in Chennai.

💡 The Rugby Premier League is a newer franchise competition introduced in India.
Q.No 35 SportsEnglish
|3वें दक्षिण एशियाई खेल में आयोजित किए गए थे।
A
2019
✓ Correct
B
2013
C
2023
D
2015

Solution

Correct answer: A. The 13th South Asian Games were held in 2019 (in Kathmandu/Pokhara, Nepal).

B is incorrect: 2013 is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 2023 is not the year.

D is incorrect: 2015 is incorrect.

💡 The South Asian Games are a biennial multi-sport event among South Asian nations.
Q.No 37 SportsEnglish
टेबल टेनिस में, खेलने का स्थान आयताकार होता है और मीटर से कम लंबा नहीं होगा।
A
15 m
B
16 m
C
14 m
✓ Correct
D
13 m

Solution

Correct answer: C. In table tennis, the playing space (room) should be no less than 14 metres long.

A is incorrect: 15 m is more than the minimum.

B is incorrect: 16 m is not the minimum length.

D is incorrect: 13 m is less than the required minimum.

💡 The table-tennis table itself is 2.74 m long and 1.525 m wide.
Q.No 35 SportsHindi
"परय्योली एक्सप्रेस " उपनाम निम्नलिखित में से किस खिलाड़ी से संबंधित है?
A
पी.टी. उषा
✓ Correct
B
रोशन मिस्त्री
C
fara fae
D
दुती चंद

Solution

Correct answer: A. The nickname 'Payyoli Express' belongs to the athlete P.T. Usha.

B is incorrect: Roshan Mistry is not associated with this nickname.

C is incorrect: This option does not name P.T. Usha.

D is incorrect: Dutee Chand is a different sprinter.

💡 P.T. Usha, from Payyoli in Kerala, narrowly missed an Olympic medal in 1984.
Q.No 36 SportsHindi
निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा खेल में नशीले पदार्थों का दुष्प्रभाव है? ।. नशीले पदार्थ हृदय गति को कम करते हैं। |. इससे उल्टी होती है।
A
Only I
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
✓ Correct
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: C. Both effects can occur with drug abuse in sport - some drugs slow the heart rate (I) and many cause side effects like vomiting (II) - so 'Both I and II' is correct.

A is incorrect: 'Only I' is incomplete.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' is incomplete.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since both can occur.

💡 Doping carries serious health risks and is banned under the WADA Code.
Q.No 34 SportsEnglish
पहली विश्व कुश्ती चैंपियनशिप में आयोजित की गई थी।
A
1904
✓ Correct
B
1960
C
1920
D
1919

Solution

Correct answer: A. The first World Wrestling Championship was held in 1904.

B is incorrect: 1960 is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 1920 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 1919 is incorrect.

💡 Wrestling is one of the oldest sports, included in the ancient Olympic Games.
Q.No 35 SportsHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
न में से कौन सा शहर 994 के राष्ट्रीय खेलों का एक मेजबान शहर था? [. बम्ब 7. पुणे
A
Only I (Bombay)
B
Only II (Pune)
C
Both I and II
✓ Correct
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: C. Both Bombay (Mumbai) and Pune were host cities of the 1994 National Games (held in Maharashtra), so 'Both I and II' is correct.

A is incorrect: 'Only I' omits Pune.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' omits Bombay.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since both hosted events.

💡 The National Games are held across multiple cities of the host state.
Q.No 37 SportsHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
टेनिस में, यदि दोनों खिलाड़ी एक खेल में तीन-तीन अंक जीतते हैं (अर्थात स्कोर 40-40 है), तो इसे कहा जाता है।
A
Deuce
✓ Correct
B
Love
C
Slice
D
Smash

Solution

Correct answer: A. In tennis, when both players reach 40-40 (three points each), the score is called 'deuce'.

B is incorrect: 'Love' means a score of zero.

C is incorrect: A 'slice' is a type of shot.

D is incorrect: A 'smash' is an overhead attacking shot.

💡 From deuce, a player must win two consecutive points (advantage, then game) to win.
Q.No 24 SportsEnglish
एक गोल्फ खिलाड़ी एक राउंड के दौरान अधिकतम कितने क्लब ले जा सकता है?
A
12
B
14
✓ Correct
C
16
D
18

Solution

Correct answer: B. A golfer may carry a maximum of 14 clubs during a round.

A is incorrect: 12 is below the allowed maximum.

C is incorrect: 16 exceeds the limit.

D is incorrect: 18 exceeds the limit (18 is the number of holes, not clubs).

💡 Carrying more than 14 clubs incurs a penalty under the rules of golf.
Q.No 35 SportsEnglish
___वींराष्ट्रीय महासंघ वरिष्ठ एथलेटिक्स प्रतियोगिता 2025 में आयोजित की गई थी।
A
22
B
23
C
28
✓ Correct
D
30

Solution

Correct answer: C. The 28th National Federation Cup Senior Athletics Competition was held in 2025.

A is incorrect: 22 is not the edition number.

B is incorrect: 23 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 30 is incorrect.

💡 The Federation Cup is a major national-level athletics meet in India.
Q.No 33 SportsEnglish
भारत ने अपना पहला पुरुष क्रिकेट विश्व कप किस वर्ष में जीता था?
A
1983
✓ Correct
B
1975
C
1999
D
1996

Solution

Correct answer: A. India won its first men's Cricket World Cup in 1983, under captain Kapil Dev.

B is incorrect: 1975 was the first-ever World Cup (won by West Indies).

C is incorrect: 1999 - India did not win.

D is incorrect: 1996 - India did not win.

💡 India beat the West Indies in the 1983 World Cup final at Lord's.
Q.No 35 SportsEnglish
वें एशियाई खेल 2026 में आइची-नागोया में आयोजित होने वाले हैं।
A
20th
✓ Correct
B
19th
C
18th
D
17th

Solution

Correct answer: A. The 20th Asian Games are to be held in 2026 at Aichi-Nagoya, Japan.

B is incorrect: 19th was Hangzhou 2022 (held in 2023).

C is incorrect: 18th was Jakarta-Palembang 2018.

D is incorrect: 17th was Incheon 2014.

💡 The Asian Games are held every four years under the Olympic Council of Asia.
Q.No 38 SportsHindi⚠ low OCR confidence
तैराकी में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा स्ट्रोक प्रयोग किया जाता है? [. ब्रेस्ट का 7. बैक
A
Only I
B
Only II
C
Both I and II
✓ Correct
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: C. Both the breaststroke (I) and the backstroke (II) are recognised swimming strokes, so 'Both I and II' is correct.

A is incorrect: 'Only I' omits the backstroke.

B is incorrect: 'Only II' omits the breaststroke.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since both are swimming strokes.

💡 The four competitive swimming strokes are freestyle, backstroke, breaststroke and butterfly.
Q.No 33 SportsEnglish
मुंबई इंडियंस महिला टीम ने अपना पहला डब्ल्यू.पी.एल. (महिला प्रीमियर लीग) खिताब कब जीता था?
A
2023
✓ Correct
B
2024
C
2022
D
2021

Solution

Correct answer: A. The Mumbai Indians women's team won the inaugural Women's Premier League (WPL) title in 2023.

B is incorrect: In 2024 Royal Challengers Bengaluru won.

C is incorrect: There was no WPL in 2022.

D is incorrect: There was no WPL in 2021.

💡 The WPL was launched by the BCCI in 2023 as the women's franchise T20 league.
Q.No 35 SportsHindi
निम्नलिखित में से किस खेल में बाएँ और दाएँ सर्विस कोर्ट देखा जाता है?
A
बैडमिंटन
✓ Correct
B
फुटबॉल
C
बास्केटबाल
D
क्रिकेट

Solution

Correct answer: A. Badminton has left and right service courts, into which the shuttle must be served diagonally.

B is incorrect: Football has no service courts.

C is incorrect: Basketball has no service courts.

D is incorrect: Cricket has no service courts.

💡 In badminton, the serve is made diagonally into the opponent's service court.
Q.No 34 SportsHindi
उसैन बोल्ट ने 2009 में अपना 00 मीटर विश्व रिकॉर्ड कहाँ बनाया था?
A
Berlin
✓ Correct
B
New York City
C
Beijing
D
Seoul

Solution

Correct answer: A. Usain Bolt set his 100 m world record (9.58 s) in 2009 at Berlin (World Championships).

B is incorrect: It was not set in New York City.

C is incorrect: It was not set in Beijing (where he set the earlier 2008 record).

D is incorrect: It was not set in Seoul.

💡 Bolt's 9.58 s remains the men's 100 m world record.
Q.No 35 SportsHindi
अनिमेष कुजूर ने 2025 में पुरुषों की 200 मीटर दौड़ का राष्ट्रीय रिकॉर्ड किस स्पर्धा में तोड़ा था?
A
एशियाई एथलेटिक्स चैंपियनशिप
✓ Correct
B
डायमंड लीग
C
एशियाई खेल
D
राष्ट्रंडल खेल

Solution

Correct answer: A. Animesh Kujur broke the men's 200 m national record in 2025 at the Asian Athletics Championships.

B is incorrect: It was not at the Diamond League.

C is incorrect: It was not at the Asian Games.

D is incorrect: It was not at the Commonwealth Games.

💡 India has seen a steady improvement in its sprint records in recent years.
Q.No 37 SportsEnglish
फुटबॉल में, ऑफेंस की प्रकृति के आधार पर, प्रकार के फ्री किक दिए जाते हैं।
A
2
✓ Correct
B
3
C
4
D
5

Solution

Correct answer: A. In football, two types of free kicks are awarded - direct and indirect - based on the nature of the offence.

B is incorrect: There are not three types.

C is incorrect: There are not four types.

D is incorrect: There are not five types.

💡 A goal can be scored directly from a direct free kick, but not from an indirect one.
Q.No 33 SportsHindi
एशियाई खेलों के पदक विजेता सचिन नाग, निम्नलिखित में से किस खेल से संबंधित हैं?
A
स्विमिंग
✓ Correct
B
गोल्फ़
C
edict
D
हॉकी

Solution

Correct answer: A. Sachin Nag, an Asian Games gold medallist, was associated with swimming.

B is incorrect: He was not a golfer.

C is incorrect: He was not a cricketer.

D is incorrect: He was not a hockey player.

💡 Sachin Nag won India's first swimming gold at the 1951 Asian Games.
Q.No 34 SportsHindi
क्रिकेट में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा क्रिकेट उपकरण मुख्य रूप से लकड़ी से बना होता है? ।. हेलमेट ॥. बैट
A
Only I (Helmet)
B
Only II (Bat)
✓ Correct
C
Both I and II
D
Neither I nor II

Solution

Correct answer: B. Among the items, the cricket bat (II) is mainly made of wood (willow), so 'Only II' is correct.

A is incorrect: 'Only I' is wrong; the helmet is not chiefly wood.

C is incorrect: 'Both' is wrong because the helmet is not wood.

D is incorrect: 'Neither' is wrong since the bat is wooden.

💡 Cricket bats are traditionally made from willow wood for its strength and light weight.
Q.No 39 SportsHindi
अविनाश साबले ने एशियाई खेल 2023 में किस स्पर्धा में स्वर्ण पदक जीता था?
A
बैडमिंटन
B
गोल्फ़
C
साइक्लिंग
D
स्टीपलचेज़
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Avinash Sable won a gold medal in the 3000 m steeplechase at the Asian Games 2023.

A is incorrect: He is not a badminton player.

B is incorrect: He is not a golfer.

C is incorrect: He is not a cyclist.

💡 Avinash Sable holds the Indian national record in the 3000 m steeplechase.
Q.No 33 SportsEnglish
भारतीय ग्रां प्री का इतिहास _____ से शुरू हुआ, जब कोलकाता में भारतीय ग्रां प्री की मेजबानी की योजना थी।
A
1997
✓ Correct
B
1994
C
1991
D
1981

Solution

Correct answer: A. The history of the Indian Grand Prix began around 1997, when a Grand Prix was planned to be hosted in Kolkata.

B is incorrect: 1994 is not the year.

C is incorrect: 1991 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 1981 is incorrect.

💡 The Formula One Indian Grand Prix was actually held at the Buddh International Circuit from 2011 to 2013.
Q.No 35 SportsHindi
निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा शब्द सामान्यतः जिम्नास्टिक से संबंधित है?
A
पावर टम्बलिंग
✓ Correct
B
पेन होल्ड ग्रिप
C
साइड स्पिन ड्राइव
D
पॉपिंग क्रीज

Solution

Correct answer: A. 'Power tumbling' is a term associated with gymnastics.

B is incorrect: 'Pen-hold grip' is a table-tennis term.

C is incorrect: 'Side-spin drive' is a table-tennis stroke.

D is incorrect: 'Popping crease' is a cricket term.

💡 Power tumbling is a gymnastics discipline performed on a sprung track.
Q.No 32 SportsHindi
राष्ट्रमंडल खेल 2022 की पदक तालिका में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा देश भारत से नीचे स्थान पर था?
A
कनाडा
B
इंग्लैंड
C
ऑस्ट्रेलिया
D
दक्षिण अफ्रीका
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. At the 2022 Commonwealth Games, South Africa finished below India in the medal tally.

A is incorrect: Canada finished above India.

B is incorrect: England finished above India.

C is incorrect: Australia topped the table, above India.

💡 India finished 4th in the 2022 CWG medal table with 61 medals.
Q.No 33 SportsHindi
निम्नलिखित में से, राष्ट्रीय खेल 2025 में अधिकतम पदक किसने जीते थे?
A
जम्मू और कश्मीर
✓ Correct
B
अंडमान व नोकोबार द्वीप समूह
C
चंडीगढ़
D
पुदुचेरी

Solution

Correct answer: A. Jammu and Kashmir won the maximum medals at the National Games 2025.

B is incorrect: Andaman & Nicobar Islands did not top the medals.

C is incorrect: Chandigarh did not win the most.

D is incorrect: Puducherry did not top the tally.

💡 The National Games are India's biggest multi-sport domestic competition.
Q.No 29 SportsHindi
भारत का पहला व्यक्तिगत ओलंपिक स्वर्ण पदक विजेता कौन है?
A
Vijay Kumar
B
Abhinav Bindra
✓ Correct
C
Leander Paes
D
Sushil Kumar

Solution

Correct answer: B. Abhinav Bindra won India's first individual Olympic gold medal (10 m air rifle) at Beijing 2008.

A is incorrect: Vijay Kumar won a silver (2012), not the first individual gold.

C is incorrect: Leander Paes won a bronze (1996).

D is incorrect: Sushil Kumar won wrestling medals but not the first individual gold.

💡 Bindra's 2008 gold was India's first individual Olympic gold of any kind.
Q.No 31 SportsEnglish
720 क्रिकेट में पावरप्ले के बाद 30 गज के घेरे के बाहर कितने फील्डर को अनुमति दी जाती है?
A
4
B
5
✓ Correct
C
3
D
6

Solution

Correct answer: B. In T20 cricket, after the powerplay, a maximum of 5 fielders are allowed outside the 30-yard circle.

A is incorrect: 4 is not the post-powerplay limit.

C is incorrect: 3 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 6 is too many.

💡 During the T20 powerplay (first 6 overs), only 2 fielders are allowed outside the circle.
Q.No 40 SportsEnglish
निम्नलिखित में से किस वर्ष में मिल्खा सिंह ने एशियाई खेलों में स्वर्ण पदक जीता था?
A
1951
B
1954
C
1958
✓ Correct
D
1970

Solution

Correct answer: C. Milkha Singh won gold at the Asian Games in 1958 (and again later); 1958 was a landmark year for him, including Commonwealth gold.

A is incorrect: 1951 is incorrect.

B is incorrect: 1954 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 1970 is incorrect.

💡 Milkha Singh, the 'Flying Sikh', narrowly missed a medal at the 1960 Rome Olympics.
Q.No 27 SportsHindi
वर्तमान ओलंपिक ध्वज पहली बार किस ओलंपिक खेलों में फहराया गया था?
A
1920 Summer Olympics
✓ Correct
B
1924 Summer Olympics
C
1920 Winter Olympics
D
1924 Winter Olympics

Solution

Correct answer: A. The current Olympic flag (with five rings) was first flown at the 1920 Summer Olympics in Antwerp.

B is incorrect: 1924 Summer Olympics is after its first flying.

C is incorrect: The 1920 Winter Olympics did not exist (Winter Games began in 1924).

D is incorrect: The 1924 Winter Olympics is not when it was first flown.

💡 The five interlocking rings represent the five inhabited continents.
Q.No 30 SportsEnglish
अंतर्राष्ट्रीय हॉकी में "फोर-क्वार्टर" फॉर्मेट कब शुरू किया गया था?
A
2012
B
2013
C
2014
✓ Correct
D
2015

Solution

Correct answer: C. The 'four-quarter' format in international hockey was introduced in 2014.

A is incorrect: 2012 is incorrect.

B is incorrect: 2013 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 2015 is incorrect.

💡 Field hockey switched from two 35-minute halves to four 15-minute quarters.
Q.No 31 SportsHindi
कौन-सा अनुक्रम ट्रायथलॉन स्पर्धाओं को सही ढंग से दर्शाता है?
A
स्विम, साइकिल, रन
✓ Correct
B
रन, स्विम, साइकिल
C
साइकिल, स्विम, रन
D
स्विम, रन, साइकिल

Solution

Correct answer: A. A triathlon is contested in the sequence: swim, then cycle (bike), then run.

B is incorrect: It does not start with running.

C is incorrect: It does not start with cycling.

D is incorrect: Running comes last, not before cycling.

💡 The triathlon became an Olympic sport at the Sydney 2000 Games.
Q.No 27 SportsHindi
महिला कबड्डी मैच की मानक अवधि क्या है?
A
20 minutes per half
B
15 minutes per half
✓ Correct
C
25 minutes per half
D
30 minutes per half

Solution

Correct answer: B. A standard women's kabaddi match has two halves of 15 minutes each.

A is incorrect: 20 minutes per half is the men's format.

C is incorrect: 25 minutes per half is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 30 minutes per half is incorrect.

💡 Men's kabaddi matches are two halves of 20 minutes each.
Q.No 39 SportsHindi
कबड्डी खेल को मुख्य रूप से _____ भारत में “हू-तू-तू” के नाम से जाना जाता है।
A
पश्चिमी
✓ Correct
B
पूर्वी
C
दक्षिण
D
उत्तरी

Solution

Correct answer: A. Kabaddi is mainly known as 'Hu-Tu-Tu' in Western India (Maharashtra region).

B is incorrect: In the east it has other names.

C is incorrect: In the south it is called Chedugudu.

D is incorrect: In the north it has different local names.

💡 Kabaddi is known by various regional names across India.
Q.No 40 SportsHindi
निम्नलिखित में से किस खेल ने अभी तक भारत को एशियाई खेलों में स्वर्ण पदक नहीं दिलाया है?
A
शूटिंग
B
गोल्फ़
C
वेटलिफ्टिंग
✓ Correct
D
एथलेटिक्स

Solution

Correct answer: C. Among the options, weightlifting has not yet won India a gold medal at the Asian Games.

A is incorrect: Shooting has won India Asian Games gold.

B is incorrect: Golf has won India an Asian Games gold.

D is incorrect: Athletics has won India Asian Games gold.

💡 India has won many Asian Games golds in athletics, shooting and other sports.
Q.No 26 SportsHindi
एशियाई कबड्डी महासंघ के नियमावली के अनुसार, सीनियर स्तर के पुरुष कबड्डी में आधिकारिक मैच की अवधि कितनी है?
A
30 मिनट (5 मिनट के दो हाफ)
B
40 मिनट (20 मिनट के दो हाफ) 5 मिनट के ब्रेक के साथ
✓ Correct
C
50 मिनट लगातार खेल
D
25 मिनट + अतिरिक्त रेड समय

Solution

Correct answer: B. In senior men's kabaddi, an official match lasts 40 minutes - two halves of 20 minutes with a 5-minute break.

A is incorrect: 30 minutes (two 15-minute halves) is the women's format.

C is incorrect: 50 minutes of continuous play is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 25 minutes plus extra is incorrect.

💡 Kabaddi is the national game of Bangladesh and very popular across South Asia.
Q.No 29 SportsHindi
टेनिस में "ड्यूस" स्कोर का क्या अर्थ होता है?
A
सर्वर को बढ़त मिलती है।
B
रिसीवर को बढ़त मिलती है।
C
स्कोर 40-40 से बराबर है।
✓ Correct
D
खेल बराबर है, लेकिन 40-40 नहीं।

Solution

Correct answer: C. In tennis, 'deuce' means the score is tied at 40-40.

A is incorrect: It does not mean the server has the advantage.

B is incorrect: It does not mean the receiver has the advantage.

D is incorrect: It specifically refers to 40-40, not just any tie.

💡 From deuce, a player must win two points in a row (advantage then game).
Q.No 30 SportsHindi
कबड्डी में बोनस अंक अर्जित करने की मुख्य शर्त क्या होती है?
A
बॉल्क लाइन को छूना
B
कम से कम दो डिफेंडरों को छूना
C
एक पैर हवा में रखते हुए बोनस लाइन पार करना
✓ Correct
D
टैकल के प्रयास से बचना

Solution

Correct answer: C. In kabaddi, a bonus point is earned mainly by the raider crossing the bonus line with at least one foot in the air (and other conditions met).

A is incorrect: Touching the baulk line alone does not earn a bonus.

B is incorrect: Touching two defenders is not the bonus condition.

D is incorrect: Avoiding a tackle is not the bonus rule.

💡 The bonus line gives raiders an extra way to score when enough defenders are present.
Q.No 25 SportsHindi
हॉकी में "स्लैप शॉट" क्या होता है?
A
खुले हाथ से लिया गया शॉट
B
स्टिक से लिया गया ज़ोरदार शॉट जिसे पीछे और फिर तेज़ी से आगे की ओर घुमाया जाता है
✓ Correct
C
कलाई से लिया गया तेज़ शॉट
D
थोड़ी दूरी से लिया गया शॉट

Solution

Correct answer: B. In hockey, a 'slap shot' is a powerful shot taken by drawing the stick back and swinging it quickly forward to strike the ball.

A is incorrect: It is not taken with an open hand.

C is incorrect: It is not a wrist-only quick shot.

D is incorrect: It is not specifically a short-range push.

💡 The slap shot generates speed while keeping the stick close to the ground.
Q.No 39 SportsHindi
निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा फील्ड हॉकी में गोल करने का तरीका नहीं है?
A
फील्ड गोल
B
पेनल्टी कॉर्नर
C
पेनल्टी स्ट्रोक
D
फ्री किक
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. A 'free kick' is NOT a way to score a goal in field hockey (it is a football term); hockey goals come via field goals, penalty corners and penalty strokes.

A is incorrect: A field goal is a valid way to score.

B is incorrect: A penalty corner can lead to a goal.

C is incorrect: A penalty stroke is a way to score.

💡 In hockey, a goal can be scored only from within the shooting circle (the 'D').
Q.No 40 SportsHindi
खेलो इंडिया शीतकालीन खेल 2024, खेलो इंडिया कैलेंडर में वार्षिक आयोजन का संस्करण है।
A
First
B
Second
C
Third
D
Fourth
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. Khelo India Winter Games 2024 was the fourth edition in the Khelo India calendar.

A is incorrect: It was not the first edition.

B is incorrect: It was not the second.

C is incorrect: It was not the third.

💡 The Khelo India Winter Games promote winter sports, held mainly in Ladakh and Jammu & Kashmir.
Q.No 26 SportsEnglish
भारत ने पहला ।00८ 720 विश्व कप किस वर्ष जीता था?
A
2005
B
2007
✓ Correct
C
2009
D
2011

Solution

Correct answer: B. India won the first-ever ICC T20 World Cup in 2007 (in South Africa), under captain M.S. Dhoni.

A is incorrect: 2005 is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 2009 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 2011 was when India won the ODI World Cup.

💡 India beat Pakistan in the final of the inaugural 2007 T20 World Cup.
Q.No 29 SportsHindi
अमेरिकी फुटबॉल में "फील्ड गोल" के कितने पॉइंट होते है?
A
1 point
B
2 points
C
3 points
✓ Correct
D
6 points

Solution

Correct answer: C. In American football, a 'field goal' is worth 3 points.

A is incorrect: 1 point is an extra-point conversion after a touchdown.

B is incorrect: 2 points is a two-point conversion or a safety.

D is incorrect: 6 points is a touchdown.

💡 A field goal is scored by kicking the ball through the opponents' goalposts.
Q.No 39 SportsEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
टेनिस में, यदि दोनों खिलाड़ी एक सेट में गेम जीतते हैं, तो सेट टाईब्रेकर में चला जाता है।
A
4
B
5
C
6
✓ Correct
D
7

Solution

Correct answer: C. In tennis, if both players win 6 games each in a set, the set goes into a tie-breaker.

A is incorrect: 4 games each does not trigger a tie-breaker.

B is incorrect: 5 games each does not.

D is incorrect: At 7 games one player has usually already won (or it went to a tie-break at 6-6).

💡 A standard tie-break is first to 7 points (with a 2-point margin).
Q.No 38 SportsEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
At the Olympic Games, the matches in a team event in table tennis is a best of affair.
A
9
B
3
C
5
✓ Correct
D
7

Solution

Correct answer: C. At the Olympics, a table-tennis team event match is a best-of-5 affair.

A is incorrect: Best of 9 is not used.

B is incorrect: Best of 3 is not the team-event format.

D is incorrect: Best of 7 is not used.

💡 Individual Olympic table-tennis matches are best of 7 games.
Q.No 39 SportsEnglish
In hockey, the distance between the inner edges of the goalposts is metres.
A
3.66
✓ Correct
B
2.44
C
1.12
D
2.98

Solution

Correct answer: A. In hockey, the distance between the inner edges of the goalposts is 3.66 metres.

B is incorrect: 2.44 m is the height of a football goal.

C is incorrect: 1.12 m is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 2.98 m is incorrect.

💡 A hockey goal is 3.66 m wide and 2.14 m high.
Q.No 40 SportsEnglish
What was India’s overall rank by total medal count at the 2018 Commonwealth Games?
A
5th
B
2nd
C
3rd
✓ Correct
D
4th

Solution

Correct answer: C. India finished 3rd in the medal tally at the 2018 Commonwealth Games (Gold Coast).

A is incorrect: India did not finish 5th.

B is incorrect: India did not finish 2nd.

D is incorrect: India did not finish 4th in 2018.

💡 India won 66 medals (26 gold) at the 2018 Commonwealth Games.
Q.No 25 SportsEnglish
किस वर्ष ।#.&# ने अपना नाम बदलकर विश्व एथलेटिक्स (४/०0 /##06005) कर लिया?
A
2008
B
2012
C
2015
D
2019
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. The IAAF renamed itself 'World Athletics' in 2019.

A is incorrect: 2008 is incorrect.

B is incorrect: 2012 is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 2015 is incorrect.

💡 World Athletics is the global governing body for track and field, road running and race walking.
Q.No 40 SportsEnglish
यह माना जाता है कि वर्ष में भारत में बास्केटबॉल का खेल वाई.एम.सी.ए. कलकत्ता में शुरू हुआ था।
A
1905
✓ Correct
B
1915
C
1925
D
1935

Solution

Correct answer: A. Basketball is believed to have started in India around 1905, at the YMCA in Calcutta.

B is incorrect: 1915 is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 1925 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 1935 is when the Basketball Federation of India was formed.

💡 The YMCA played a key role in introducing basketball and volleyball to India.
Q.No 26 SportsEnglish
In which year did Pullela Gopichand win the All-England Open Badminton Championships?
A
1999
B
2000
C
2001
✓ Correct
D
2003

Solution

Correct answer: C. Pullela Gopichand won the All-England Open Badminton Championships in 2001.

A is incorrect: 1999 is incorrect.

B is incorrect: 2000 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 2003 is incorrect.

💡 Gopichand was the second Indian to win the prestigious All-England title (after Prakash Padukone).
Q.No 30 SportsEnglish
In boxing, how many judges score an Olympic-style bout?
A
3
B
5
✓ Correct
C
4
D
2

Solution

Correct answer: B. In Olympic-style boxing, 5 judges score a bout.

A is incorrect: 3 judges is not the Olympic standard.

C is incorrect: 4 is incorrect.

D is incorrect: 2 is incorrect.

💡 Boxing uses the 10-point must system, with judges scoring each round.
Q.No 39 SportsEnglish⚠ low OCR confidence
There are 28 hurdle jumps and water jumps in 3000 metres steeplechase event.
A
4
B
5
C
6
D
7
✓ Correct

Solution

Correct answer: D. In the 3000 m steeplechase, there are 28 hurdle jumps and 7 water jumps.

A is incorrect: 4 water jumps is incorrect.

B is incorrect: 5 is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 6 is incorrect.

💡 The steeplechase combines distance running with fixed barriers and a water jump.
Q.No 25 SportsHindi
ऐतिहासिक 983 क्रिकेट विश्व कप फ़ाइनल, जिसमें भारत ने वेस्ट इंडीज़ को हराया था, किस प्रतिष्ठित स्थल पर आयोजित किया गया था?
A
लॉर्ड्स, लंदन
✓ Correct
B
द ओवल, लंदन
C
हेडिंग्ली, लीड्स
D
ओल्ड ट्रैफ़र्ड, मैनचेस्टर

Solution

Correct answer: A. The historic 1983 Cricket World Cup final, where India beat the West Indies, was played at Lord's, London.

B is incorrect: It was not at The Oval.

C is incorrect: It was not at Headingley.

D is incorrect: It was not at Old Trafford.

💡 Kapil Dev's India won the 1983 World Cup, a turning point for Indian cricket.
Q.No 27 SportsHindi
टेस्ट क्रिकेट में तिहरा शतक बनाने वाले पहले भारतीय बल्लेबाज कौन थे?
A
सचिन तेंदुलकर
B
वीरेंद्र सहवाग
✓ Correct
C
राहुल द्रविड़
D
करुण नायर

Solution

Correct answer: B. Virender Sehwag was the first Indian batsman to score a triple century in Test cricket (309 vs Pakistan, 2004).

A is incorrect: Sachin Tendulkar did not score a Test triple century.

C is incorrect: Rahul Dravid did not score a triple century.

D is incorrect: Karun Nair later scored a triple century, but after Sehwag.

💡 Sehwag scored two Test triple centuries, the only Indian to do so.
Q.No 39 SportsEnglish
टेनिस में एक खिलाड़ी/टीम को गेम जीतने के लिए ड्यूस के बाद लगातार अंक जीतने की आवश्यकता होती हैं।
A
1
B
2
✓ Correct
C
3
D
4

Solution

Correct answer: B. In tennis, after deuce a player/team must win 2 consecutive points (advantage, then game) to win the game.

A is incorrect: Winning only 1 point gives 'advantage', not the game.

C is incorrect: 3 consecutive points is not required.

D is incorrect: 4 is incorrect.

💡 If the player who has advantage loses the next point, the score returns to deuce.
Q.No 24 SportsHindi
अंतर्रष्ट्रीय हॉकी महासंघ (#।#) के नियमावली के अनुसार, आधुनिक फील्ड हॉकी मैच की मानक अवधि क्या है?
A
Two halves of 35 minutes
B
Four quarters of 15 minutes
✓ Correct
C
60 minutes continuous
D
Three periods of 20 minutes

Solution

Correct answer: B. A modern field-hockey match is played in four quarters of 15 minutes each (since 2014).

A is incorrect: Two 35-minute halves was the older format.

C is incorrect: It is not 60 minutes continuous.

D is incorrect: It is not three 20-minute periods.

💡 The four-quarter format gives more breaks for strategy and recovery.
Q.No 40 SportsHindi
2008 में पहला आई.पी.एल. फाइनल किस शहर में खेला गया था?
A
नवी मुंबई
✓ Correct
B
चेन्नई
C
जयपुर
D
लखनऊ

Solution

Correct answer: A. The first IPL final in 2008 was played at the DY Patil Stadium in Navi Mumbai.

B is incorrect: It was not in Chennai.

C is incorrect: It was not in Jaipur.

D is incorrect: It was not in Lucknow.

💡 Rajasthan Royals won the inaugural 2008 IPL title there.
Q.No 26 SportsHindi
आधिकारिक दिशानिर्देशों के तहत लक्ष्य तीरंदाजी में एक तीरंदाज को तीन तीर चलाने के लिए अधिकतम कितना समय दिया जाता है?
A
1 minute
B
2 minutes
✓ Correct
C
3 minutes
D
4 minutes

Solution

Correct answer: B. In target archery, an archer is generally given a maximum of 2 minutes to shoot three arrows (one end).

A is incorrect: 1 minute is too short for three arrows.

C is incorrect: 3 minutes is more than allowed.

D is incorrect: 4 minutes is incorrect.

💡 Archers shoot 'ends' of three or six arrows within set time limits.
Q.No 29 SportsHindi
किसी भारतीय गेंदबाज द्वारा लिए गए सर्वाधिक टेस्ट मैच विकेटों का रिकॉर्ड किसके नाम है?
A
अनिल कुंबले
✓ Correct
B
हरभजन सिंह
C
कपिल देव
D
आर. अश्विन

Solution

Correct answer: A. Anil Kumble holds the record for the most Test wickets by an Indian bowler (619 wickets).

B is incorrect: Harbhajan Singh took fewer Test wickets.

C is incorrect: Kapil Dev took 434 Test wickets.

D is incorrect: R. Ashwin's tally, while high, is the record being compared (Kumble leads among the listed).

💡 Anil Kumble once took all 10 wickets in a Test innings (vs Pakistan, 1999).
Q.No 39 SportsEnglish
कबड्डी में, बोनस लाइन पार करने पर, जब कैचर टीम में न्यूनतम खिलाड़ी होते हैं, तो रेडर को बोनस अंक दिया जाता है।
A
4
B
5
C
6
✓ Correct
D
3

Solution

Correct answer: C. In kabaddi, a raider gets a bonus point on crossing the bonus line when the defending (catcher) team has at least 6 players on the mat.

A is incorrect: 4 players is not the threshold.

B is incorrect: 5 players is not the threshold.

D is incorrect: 3 players is not the threshold.

💡 The bonus line gives raiders an extra scoring opportunity when enough defenders are present.
Q.No 39 SportsHindi
ताची-वाजा, कोशी-वाजा निम्नलिखित में से किस खेल से संबंधित शब्द हैं?
A
बैडमिंटन
B
कबड्डी
C
जूडो
✓ Correct
D
स्विमिंग

Solution

Correct answer: C. 'Tachi-waza' and 'Koshi-waza' are terms associated with judo (standing and hip throwing techniques).

A is incorrect: They are not badminton terms.

B is incorrect: They are not kabaddi terms.

D is incorrect: They are not swimming terms.

💡 Judo techniques are broadly divided into throwing (nage-waza) and grappling (katame-waza).
Q.No 28 SportsEnglish
ग्रैंड स्लैम खिताब जीतने वाले पहले भारतीय महेश भूपति थे। उन्होंने यह उपलब्धि किस वर्ष हासिल की?
A
1995
B
1997
✓ Correct
C
1998
D
1999

Solution

Correct answer: B. Mahesh Bhupathi became the first Indian to win a Grand Slam title in 1997 (mixed doubles at the French Open).

A is incorrect: 1995 is incorrect.

C is incorrect: 1998 is after his first Grand Slam.

D is incorrect: 1999 is incorrect.

💡 Mahesh Bhupathi won the 1997 French Open mixed doubles with Rika Hiraki.
Q.No 31 SportsEnglish
भारत की महिला कबड्डी टीम ने अपना पहला एशियाई खेलों का स्वर्ण पदक कब जीता?
A
2010
✓ Correct
B
2006
C
2014
D
2002

Solution

Correct answer: A. India's women's kabaddi team won its first Asian Games gold medal in 2010 (Guangzhou), when women's kabaddi debuted at the Games.

B is incorrect: 2006 did not feature women's kabaddi at the Asian Games.

C is incorrect: 2014 - India also won, but not the first.

D is incorrect: 2002 is incorrect.

💡 India dominated kabaddi at the Asian Games for many years.
